title: Energizing American Chicken Bowl
description: A peppery, velvety post-workout bowl packed with ground cardamom and fresh veggies, Whole30-friendly and bursting with American flavors.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, ground cardamom, smoked paprika, chili powder, and salt, sautéing for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add ground chicken to the skillet, breaking it apart, and cook until no longer pink, about 6 minutes.
In a separate pot, boil diced sweet potato until tender, 8-10 minutes, then drain.
Toss the cooked sweet potatoes, diced bell peppers, and chicken together, season with pepper, and simmer for 2 minutes to meld flavors.
Meanwhile, pound coconut milk in a mortar with a pinch of salt to create a velvety sauce.
Pour the coconut sauce over the bowl mixture and stir to coat evenly.
Divide the mixture into bowls, top with diced avocado, chopped cilantro, and a squeeze of lime juice.
Serve immediately for a post-workout boost.
